headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16-17, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds secured a narrow victory over the Minnesota Twins, 5-4, while the Chicago Cubs edged the New York Mets 4-2.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Jhoan Duran, a right-handed pitcher for the Philadelphia Phillies, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain. Additionally, the Chicago White Sox transferred RHP Prelander Berroa to the 60-day injured list for Tommy John surgery recovery, while the Chicago Cubs transferred RHP Cade Horton to the 60-day injured list for a right forearm strain.

Roster movement has been significant, with the Los Angeles Dodgers acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers sent RHP Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott. The New York Mets also traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren, who earned the win with 7.0 innings pitched, 11 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins 5-4 in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a narrow victory over the Minnesota Twins, winning 5-4. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with 2 RBI in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged the New York Mets 4-2, with Jameson Taillon earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Carson Kelly led the Cubs' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Cedric Mullins leading the charge at the plate. Mullins finished with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs in 5 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Phillies RHP Jhoan Duran Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies right-handed pitcher Jhoan Duran has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, 2026, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
